cases.input: Before writing user stories for the guest-role feature, assemble a context package from the code graph, requirements, and constraints.
cases.notes: Canonical trigger: assembling a context package before a downstream spw generation skill runs.

cases.input: I need a source-attributed, human-approved context package covering blast radius for this RBAC change before any artifact gets generated from it.
cases.notes: Emphasizes blast radius + human-approved + source-attributed, distinct phrasing from case 01.

cases.input: Quick question — what does the get_db function in this file actually do?
cases.notes: A simple lookup — exactly the case the skill's own 'Do NOT use for simple lookups' clause exists to redirect away from the full context-assembly pipeline.
